summary.sosovalue: Predominantly positive community sentiment with high engagement on market analysis posts (e.g., SoSoValue Flash on geopolitics and tech rotation garnering 11k+ likes). Used as a reliable data source for ETF flows and Fear & Greed Index. Referral promotions and trader discussions highlight utility in low-cap trading and alerts. Minimal negativity observed.
summary.sodex: Strongly positive, driven by farming enthusiasm on SoDEX perp DEX. Users report massive volume (8-fig), profits (5-fig nearing), and SoPoints accumulation for S1 airdrop. Community praises low competition, high rewards (100M $SOSO allocation), and active Brazil Discord. Hype around trading/staking.
summary.ssi: Limited direct mentions; neutral to positive as part of SoSoValue ecosystem (bundled investments for risk reduction). No strong sentiment, but integrated into promotional threads positively.
